name: @agiterra/wallet-extension-core
description: Shared core for @agiterra/wallet-extension and @agiterra/wallet-extension-ci. Vault, signing, EIP-1193 bridge, LocalRpcDecider, ManualDecider. NO Wire dep — wire-mediated signing lives in @agiterra/wallet-extension (prod).
author: Tim Garthwaite <https://github.com/mividtim>
